name: hopper-mcp
description: MCP server for Hopper with indexed state and transaction-safe annotations.

scripts.check: node --check src/*.js && node --check test/*.mjs && node --check test/fixtures/*.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && node --test test/protocol.mjs test/smoke.mjs test/store.mjs test/lifecycle.mjs test/macho.mjs test/snapshot.mjs test/transactions.mjs test/research.mjs
